reason:
This is not a mechanical PV-copy + keyword-reset bump. Besides the trivial mechanical edits (copyright 1999-2023 -> 1999-2025; EAPI=7 -> EAPI=8; HOMEPAGE gains a trailing slash), the truth ebuild restructures the whole body around a live-ebuild capability that has no trace in the before file:

  +if [[ "${PV}" == *9999* ]] ; then
  +	inherit git-r3
  +	EGIT_REPO_URI="https://github.com/volrath/${PN}.el"
  +else
  +	SRC_URI="https://github.com/volrath/${PN}.el/archive/${PV}.tar.gz\n\t\t-> ${P}.tar.gz"
  +	S="${WORKDIR}/${PN}.el-${PV}"
  +	KEYWORDS="amd64 x86"
  +fi

and

  -DOCS="README.md"
  +
